reviews.review_description: I can't play the game it is just a black screen forever after pressing play with sounds:/
It looks like it’s shaping up to be an awesome game! Super excited to see where it goes!
I was excited to play but I can’t select a game mode

I love these ship or boat based games  . It was sooo much fun being captain of your own pirate ship .i loved   the fact i could fill my tankard in the tavern and have a  drink. I felt a real scale of things especially climbing up to the crows nest . I hope this game gets lots more things brilliant keep up the good work im fed up with shooters and zombies. Truly looking forward to more.thanks
The game seems fun but… how do I move? Cus I see these other people talking about free roam and finding treasure and a shovel so… how do I free roam? Or am I just dumb?

developer_response.body: Hi, you've discovered this game while it is undergoing a transition. Currently the singleplayer free roam mode you've seen mentioned is disabled, and a multiplayer free roam will take its place in the coming months. Apologies!

reviews.review_description: 100% has potential to be a really neat vr pirate game!
I discovered this game only today and I was interested in the whole idea, but the website doesn't work, I could ask for more information about the game

developer_response.body: Hi, the best place to get information is in our Discord server: https://discord.gg/FhxDexKxd9

reviews.review_description: Even though it’s a pre alpha I was pleasantly surprised by how detailed this game was since most other sailing or pirate games on be fall short. Can’t wait to see what else is coming next
The game is awesome with it’s free roam but you can’t find the treasure without your hands and your shovel because you can’t even bring your shovel with you without it glitching
I love this game its actually surprisingly very detailed and fun to play when you’re bored but i cant figure out how to use the boat on free roam
